summary.productName: SaaS 訂閱與計費管理平台（Subscription & Billing System）
goals: 作為 SaaS 產品的單一事實來源，統一管理訂閱狀態、計費、用量、功能開關與實際權限。
支援多方案與多計費週期，並以資料驅動方式管理方案內容。
支援用量計費與超量策略，並依 billing cycle 重設或分期計量。
以後端 entitlement 計算確保 UI 與 Backend 對功能與限制的判斷一致。
支援 invoice 全流程、付款失敗寬限期、停權與恢復限制。
支援 Platform Admin 進行方案管理、強制停權與全平台監控，且所有操作都需寫入稽核紀錄。

source.sectionTitle: ① Entry State Machine

validations.description: entry route renders guest-safe entry options only, Guest header shows Pricing, Login, Sign Up, and no App or Admin navigation is visible

narrative.summary: 從入口前往 Pricing 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 continueAsGuest，導向 PricingPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /pricing succeeds with public access, pricing page loads without session, and header still hides App and Admin navigation

narrative.summary: 從入口前往 Login 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 chooseLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /login succeeds with public access, login form route is reachable without session, and no authenticated-only navigation is rendered

narrative.summary: 從入口前往 Sign Up 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 chooseSignUp，導向 SignUpPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /signup succeeds with public access, sign-up form route is reachable without session, and no authenticated-only navigation is rendered

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 Pricing 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 到 page_pricing 的父子關係。

source.sectionTitle: ② Pricing Page State Machine

validations.description: /pricing renders public pricing layout, Guest header shows Pricing, Login, Sign Up only, and no App or Admin CTA is shown

narrative.summary: 載入公開方案資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Init 觸發 loadPlans，進入 PricingPage.Loading。

validations.description: pricing API request starts once per page entry, pricing CTA is not duplicated in page body and header, and loading state prevents repeated fetch submission

narrative.summary: 價格方案資料載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Loading 收到 plansLoaded，轉入 PricingPage.Ready。

validations.description: plans API returns 200 with data-driven plan names, billing cycles, prices, limits, and features, and UI shows plan comparison without authenticated-only controls

narrative.summary: 價格方案資料載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Loading 收到 plansUnavailable，轉入 PricingPage.Error。

validations.description: failed pricing fetch shows understandable error state with retry action, no stale price table is rendered as ready data, and guest access remains public

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入 Pricing。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Error 觸發 retryPricing，返回 PricingPage.Init。

validations.description: retry re-enters pricing initialization, issues a new plans fetch, and clears prior error banner before reloading

narrative.summary: Pricing 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_pricing 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 從 Pricing 前往 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Ready 觸發 clickLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: Login CTA appears once, navigation to /login succeeds, and selected pricing context does not expose any App or Admin route

narrative.summary: 從 Pricing 前往 Sign Up。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PricingPage.Ready 觸發 clickSignUp，導向 SignUpPage.Init。

validations.description: Sign Up CTA appears once, navigation to /signup succeeds, and pricing comparison remains public with no authenticated-only action leakage

source.sectionTitle: ③ Login Page State Machine

validations.description: /login is publicly reachable, login layout renders without requiring session, and Guest header excludes App and Admin navigation

narrative.summary: 顯示登入表單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Init 觸發 showLoginForm，進入 LoginPage.Ready。

validations.description: login form fields and submit CTA render, submit action is shown once, and no sign-in-protected data is fetched before credentials are entered

narrative.summary: Login 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_login 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 從 Login 頁啟動登入流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 submitCredentials，導向 AuthLoginFeature.Init。

validations.description: login submit sends credential request once, submit button prevents duplicate submission while auth starts, and authentication logic is handled by backend rather than UI-only role checks

narrative.summary: 從 Login 頁切換到 Sign Up。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 openSignUp，導向 SignUpPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /signup succeeds, cross-link remains public, and login page does not retain duplicate registration CTA after navigation

narrative.summary: 從 Login 頁返回 Pricing。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 backToPricing，導向 PricingPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate back to /pricing succeeds, guest-visible pricing content is shown, and authenticated-only navigation remains hidden

source.sectionTitle: ④ Sign Up Page State Machine

validations.description: /signup is publicly reachable, sign-up layout renders without session, and Guest header excludes App and Admin navigation

narrative.summary: 顯示註冊表單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignUpPage.Init 觸發 showRegistrationForm，進入 SignUpPage.Ready。

validations.description: registration form fields and submit CTA render, sign-up CTA appears once, and no protected organization data is requested before submission

narrative.summary: Sign Up 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_sign_up 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 從 Sign Up 頁啟動註冊流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignUpPage.Ready 觸發 submitRegistration，導向 AuthSignUpFeature.Init。

validations.description: sign-up submit starts one registration request, UI prevents repeated submission, and backend creates identity through the defined onboarding flow instead of assuming existing membership

narrative.summary: 從 Sign Up 頁切換到 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignUpPage.Ready 觸發 openLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /login succeeds, login form becomes the active auth entry, and sign-up page does not keep duplicate login CTA after navigation

narrative.summary: 從 Sign Up 頁返回 Pricing。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignUpPage.Ready 觸發 backToPricing，導向 PricingPage.Init。

validations.description: navigate to /pricing succeeds, public plan comparison is shown, and no authenticated-only navigation is displayed

source.sectionTitle: ⑤ App Dashboard Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /app requires authenticated session, unauthenticated access is intercepted before protected dashboard data is shown, and authenticated header is selected only after login succeeds

narrative.summary: 載入 Dashboard 摘要。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Init 觸發 loadDashboardSummary，進入 AppDashboardPage.Loading。

validations.description: authenticated dashboard request starts summary fetch once for the selected organization, header shows Dashboard, Subscription, Usage, Invoices, and no duplicated page CTA is rendered

narrative.summary: Dashboard 摘要資料載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Loading 收到 summaryLoaded，轉入 AppDashboardPage.Ready。

validations.description: dashboard APIs return 200 with subscription status, plan, billing cycle, usage summary, recent invoices, and risk indicators scoped to the selected organization_id

narrative.summary: Dashboard 摘要資料載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Loading 收到 summaryUnavailable，轉入 AppDashboardPage.Error。

validations.description: failed dashboard fetch shows understandable error state with retry, no partial protected summary is treated as ready, and session state remains unchanged

narrative.summary: 重新載入 Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Error 觸發 retryDashboard，返回 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears dashboard error state, re-runs organization-scoped summary fetch, and does not create duplicate dashboard requests from a single user action

narrative.summary: App Dashboard 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_app_dashboard 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時轉回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request to /app returns 401 or route guard redirect to /login, dashboard data is not exposed, and return target remains the protected app area

narrative.summary: 從 Dashboard 前往 Subscription。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Ready 觸發 openSubscription，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to /app/subscription preserves selected organization context, subscription page opens for authenticated users only, and no duplicate subscription CTA is shown in both header and page body for the same action

narrative.summary: 從 Dashboard 前往 Usage。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Ready 觸發 openUsage，導向 UsagePage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to /app/usage preserves selected organization context, usage page opens for authenticated users only, and meter data remains scoped to that organization

narrative.summary: 從 Dashboard 前往 Invoices。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Ready 觸發 openInvoices，導向 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to invoice history preserves selected organization context, invoice list remains protected behind login, and only invoices for the chosen organization are reachable

narrative.summary: 從 Dashboard 啟動組織切換。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Ready 觸發 changeOrganization，導向 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init。

validations.description: organization switcher is visible only when user belongs to multiple organizations, switching starts org-scoped flow, and current dashboard data is not mutated until selection is applied

narrative.summary: 從 Dashboard 進入 Org Admin 差異視圖。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.Ready 觸發 openOrgAdminActions，導向 AppDashboardPage.OrgAdmin.Init。

validations.description: Org Admin delta entry is available only when current member role is ORG_ADMIN, Payment Methods and Members shortcuts become visible only for Org Admin, and regular End User does not see these actions

source.sectionTitle: ⑥ Subscription Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /app/subscription requires authenticated session, protected subscription details are not rendered before auth succeeds, and authenticated app navigation is shown instead of guest navigation

narrative.summary: 載入目前組織的訂閱資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Init 觸發 loadSubscription，進入 SubscriptionPage.Loading。

validations.description: subscription summary request starts once for the selected organization_id, loading state prevents repeated fetch actions, and page does not show Org Admin CTAs until role is resolved

narrative.summary: 訂閱摘要載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Loading 收到 subscriptionLoaded，轉入 SubscriptionPage.Ready。

validations.description: API returns 200 with current plan, billing cycle, subscription.status, next invoice date, and pending downgrade data if present, all scoped to the selected organization

narrative.summary: 訂閱摘要載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Loading 收到 subscriptionUnavailable，轉入 SubscriptionPage.Error。

validations.description: failed subscription fetch shows understandable error state and retry action, no stale plan or status is presented as current, and selected organization context remains intact

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入訂閱頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Error 觸發 retrySubscription，返回 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears subscription error state, starts a new organization-scoped fetch, and does not duplicate pending management actions

narrative.summary: Subscription 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_subscription 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request to /app/subscription returns 401 or redirects to /login, subscription payload is not exposed, and protected route access is preserved for post-login return

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 前往 Usage。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Ready 觸發 openUsageContext，導向 UsagePage.Init。

validations.description: usage navigation preserves current organization, usage page reflects the same plan limits context, and cross-page data stays consistent with the loaded subscription

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 前往 Invoice 歷史。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Ready 觸發 openInvoiceHistory，導向 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: invoice history navigation preserves organization scope, invoice records match the current subscription, and access remains restricted to authenticated organization members

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 啟動組織切換。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Ready 觸發 changeOrganization，導向 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init。

validations.description: organization switch flow starts from authenticated context only, currently loaded subscription data is organization-scoped, and selection change is deferred until user confirms switch

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 進入 Org Admin 管理視圖。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.Ready 觸發 openOrgAdminSubscriptionActions，導向 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init。

validations.description: Org Admin management entry appears only for ORG_ADMIN membership, Upgrade, Downgrade, Cancel, and Payment Methods actions are hidden or disabled for non-Org Admin users with clear reason

source.sectionTitle: ⑦ Usage Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /app/usage requires authenticated session, usage data is protected behind login, and authenticated app navigation is shown instead of guest navigation

narrative.summary: 載入本期使用量資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Init 觸發 loadUsage，進入 UsagePage.Loading。

validations.description: usage request starts once for selected organization_id and current billing period, loading state prevents repeated fetch actions, and page waits for meter and limit payload before enabling actions

narrative.summary: 使用量資料載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Loading 收到 usageLoaded，轉入 UsagePage.Ready。

validations.description: API returns 200 with API calls, storage, user count, project count, limits, reset time, and overage strategy for the current billing cycle, all scoped to the selected organization

narrative.summary: 本期沒有使用量資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Loading 收到 noUsageForPeriod，轉入 UsagePage.Empty。

validations.description: API returns empty usage period without treating it as error, UI shows empty state plus reset timing and available limits, and no stale prior-period numbers remain visible

narrative.summary: 使用量資料載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Loading 收到 usageUnavailable，轉入 UsagePage.Error。

validations.description: failed usage fetch shows understandable error state with retry, no meter values are presented as current, and organization context is preserved for retry

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入 Usage。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Error 觸發 retryUsage，返回 UsagePage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears usage error state, issues a new billing-period usage request, and does not double-count or mutate stored usage values

narrative.summary: Usage 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_usage 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request to /app/usage returns 401 or redirects to /login, no usage metrics are disclosed, and protected route target remains the usage page after login

narrative.summary: 從 Usage 前往 Subscription。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Ready 觸發 openPlanLimits，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to subscription preserves current organization, plan and entitlement limits shown there match the usage page limit context, and access remains authenticated-only

narrative.summary: 從 Usage 前往 Invoice 歷史。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Ready 觸發 openBillingHistory，導向 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to invoices preserves organization scope, invoice history remains consistent with usage billing cycle, and protected billing data stays organization-isolated

narrative.summary: 從 Usage 啟動組織切換。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Ready 觸發 changeOrganization，導向 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init。

validations.description: organization switch flow is available only for users with multiple organizations, current usage payload remains unchanged until selection is applied, and switch is scoped to the authenticated user memberships

narrative.summary: 從空資料狀態查看方案限制。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 UsagePage.Empty 觸發 reviewPlanLimits，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: from empty usage state user can review current plan limits, navigation preserves organization scope, and plan details explain limits without fabricating usage records

source.sectionTitle: ⑧ Invoices Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /app/billing/invoices requires authenticated session, invoice data is protected, and authenticated app navigation is shown instead of guest navigation

narrative.summary: 載入發票清單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Init 觸發 loadInvoices，進入 InvoicesPage.Loading。

validations.description: invoice list request starts once for selected organization_id, loading state prevents repeated fetch actions, and page waits for billing payload before showing totals or statuses

narrative.summary: 發票資料載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Loading 收到 invoicesLoaded，轉入 InvoicesPage.Ready。

validations.description: API returns 200 with invoice statuses Draft, Open, Paid, Failed, or Voided, billing periods, totals, and payment timestamps scoped to the selected organization

narrative.summary: 沒有發票資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Loading 收到 noInvoices，轉入 InvoicesPage.Empty。

validations.description: empty invoice response is rendered as empty state rather than error, UI shows no-invoice guidance, and no stale billing row remains visible

narrative.summary: 發票資料載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Loading 收到 invoicesUnavailable，轉入 InvoicesPage.Error。

validations.description: failed invoice fetch shows understandable error state with retry, no stale payment result is treated as current, and organization scope remains unchanged

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入發票頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Error 觸發 retryInvoices，返回 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears invoice error state, starts a new organization-scoped invoice fetch, and does not duplicate invoice rows or payment events

narrative.summary: Invoices 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_invoices 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request to invoice history returns 401 or redirects to /login, no billing amounts or statuses are exposed, and protected route target remains invoice history after login

narrative.summary: 從 Invoices 返回 Subscription 狀態。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Ready 觸發 openSubscriptionStatus，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to subscription preserves organization scope, subscription status shown there is consistent with invoice payment result such as PastDue or Active, and access remains authenticated-only

narrative.summary: 從 Invoices 啟動組織切換。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Ready 觸發 changeOrganization，導向 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init。

validations.description: organization switching starts from authenticated invoice context only, invoice list remains bound to the current organization until switch is applied, and other organizations' invoices are not exposed

narrative.summary: 從空發票狀態返回 Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 InvoicesPage.Empty 觸發 backToDashboard，導向 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation back to dashboard succeeds for authenticated users, dashboard summary stays in the same organization context, and invoice empty state does not leak across organizations

source.sectionTitle: ⑨ Payment Methods Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /app/billing/payment-methods requires authenticated session and Org Admin authorization, payment method data is not exposed before both checks pass, and page is not listed for non-Org Admin navigation

narrative.summary: 非 Org Admin 進入時顯示拒絕存取。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Init 收到 rejectNonOrgAdmin，轉入 PaymentMethodsPage.AccessDenied。

validations.description: authenticated non-Org Admin user receives 403 or access denied state, Add or Update Payment Method CTA is hidden or disabled with reason, and backend permission check is enforced beyond UI visibility

narrative.summary: 載入付款方式清單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Init 觸發 loadPaymentMethods，進入 PaymentMethodsPage.Loading。

validations.description: Org Admin request starts one organization-scoped payment method fetch, loading state prevents repeated actions, and only methods for the selected organization_id are queried

narrative.summary: 付款方式資料載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Loading 收到 paymentMethodsLoaded，轉入 PaymentMethodsPage.Ready。

validations.description: API returns 200 with payment method list and default flag for the selected organization, UI shows manageable methods, and Add or Update CTA appears once for Org Admin

narrative.summary: 沒有付款方式資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Loading 收到 noPaymentMethods，轉入 PaymentMethodsPage.Empty。

validations.description: empty payment method response renders explicit empty state, no stale card entry remains visible, and page still offers the first add-payment action only to Org Admin

narrative.summary: 付款方式資料載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Loading 收到 paymentMethodsUnavailable，轉入 PaymentMethodsPage.Error。

validations.description: failed payment method fetch shows understandable error state with retry, sensitive payment metadata is not partially rendered, and organization scope remains unchanged

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入付款方式頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Error 觸發 retryPaymentMethods，返回 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears payment method error state, issues a new organization-scoped fetch, and does not duplicate stored payment method rows

narrative.summary: Payment Methods 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_payment_methods 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request returns 401 or redirects to /login, no payment method metadata is exposed, and protected route target remains payment methods after login

narrative.summary: 從 Payment Methods 啟動付款方式管理。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Ready 觸發 addOrUpdatePaymentMethod，導向 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can start add or update flow, selected organization's payment method context is passed into feature, and CTA is not duplicated elsewhere on the page

narrative.summary: 從 Payment Methods 啟動組織切換。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodsPage.Ready 觸發 changeOrganization，導向 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init。

validations.description: organization switcher is available only to users with multiple organizations, current payment method list remains tied to the active organization until switch is applied, and other organizations' methods are not exposed

narrative.summary: 從空資料狀態新增第一個付款方式。

source.sectionTitle: ⑰ Admin Audit Log Page State Machine

validations.description: entering /admin/audit requires authenticated Platform Admin session, audit records are not exposed before authorization, and admin header remains visible only for platform admins

narrative.summary: 非 Platform Admin 進入時顯示拒絕存取。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Init 收到 rejectNonPlatformAdmin，轉入 AdminAuditLogPage.AccessDenied。

validations.description: authenticated non-Platform Admin receives 403 or access denied state, audit query controls remain hidden, and backend authorization blocks route access beyond UI hiding

narrative.summary: 載入稽核紀錄。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Init 觸發 loadAuditLog，進入 AdminAuditLogPage.Loading。

validations.description: audit log query starts once, loading state prevents repeated fetch actions, and page waits for authorized audit payload before rendering entries

narrative.summary: 稽核紀錄載入完成。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Loading 收到 auditLogLoaded，轉入 AdminAuditLogPage.Ready。

validations.description: API returns 200 with who, when, what, why, actor role context, and optional organization reference, and audit entries are visible only to Platform Admin

narrative.summary: 查無稽核紀錄。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Loading 收到 noAuditEntries，轉入 AdminAuditLogPage.Empty。

validations.description: empty audit response renders explicit empty state rather than error, no stale audit row remains visible, and query controls remain available to Platform Admin

narrative.summary: 稽核紀錄載入失敗。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Loading 收到 auditLogUnavailable，轉入 AdminAuditLogPage.Error。

validations.description: failed audit fetch shows understandable error state with retry, no stale audit entry is treated as current, and platform scope remains unchanged

narrative.summary: 從錯誤狀態重新載入 Audit Log。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Error 觸發 retryAuditLog，返回 AdminAuditLogPage.Init。

validations.description: retry clears audit error state, issues a new authorized audit query, and does not duplicate audit rows

narrative.summary: Admin Audit Log 頁隸屬於 Entry。
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_admin_audit_log 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回 Login。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Init 觸發 requireLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated request returns 401 or redirects to /login, audit log data is not disclosed, and protected route target remains audit log after login

narrative.summary: 從 Audit Log 啟動查詢流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Ready 觸發 queryAuditLog，導向 AuditLogQueryFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Platform Admin can enter audit query feature, current filter context is passed to feature, and query CTA is not duplicated elsewhere on the page

narrative.summary: 從 Audit Log 返回 Admin Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Ready 觸發 backToAdminOverview，導向 AdminDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation back to admin overview succeeds, audit page is exited cleanly, and protected audit data is no longer in active view

narrative.summary: 從空稽核結果返回 Admin Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.Empty 觸發 backToAdminOverview，導向 AdminDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation back to admin overview succeeds from empty audit state, no audit entry is fabricated, and admin summary remains protected

narrative.summary: 拒絕存取後返回 Admin Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminAuditLogPage.AccessDenied 觸發 backToAdminOverview，導向 AdminDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: denied user leaves restricted audit page, audit data remains hidden, and admin overview access is re-evaluated on navigation

source.sectionTitle: ⑱ App Dashboard Role-specific Page State Machine

validations.description: Org Admin delta opens only when current membership role is ORG_ADMIN, Payment Methods and Members actions become visible, and these management CTAs are not shown to regular End User

narrative.summary: App Dashboard Base 包含 Org Admin 差異視圖。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_app_dashboard 到 page_app_dashboard_org_admin 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 從 Org Admin Dashboard 差異視圖前往 Payment Methods。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openPaymentMethods，導向 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can navigate from dashboard delta to payment methods, target page enforces same organization scope, and non-Org Admin users cannot reach this route through UI or backend

narrative.summary: 從 Org Admin Dashboard 差異視圖前往 Members。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openMembers，導向 MembersPage.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can navigate from dashboard delta to members page, target page enforces organization isolation, and non-Org Admin users receive 403 if they try direct access

narrative.summary: 關閉 Org Admin Dashboard 差異視圖並返回 Base 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AppDashboardPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 closeOrgAdminActions，導向 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: closing Org Admin delta returns to base dashboard without mutating subscription or organization context, and Org Admin-only shortcuts collapse from the page-specific action area

source.sectionTitle: ⑲ Subscription Role-specific Page State Machine

validations.description: Org Admin subscription delta opens only for ORG_ADMIN membership, Upgrade, Downgrade, Cancel, and Payment Methods actions become visible, and these management actions stay hidden or disabled for non-Org Admin users

narrative.summary: Subscription Base 包含 Org Admin 管理差異視圖。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_subscription 到 page_subscription_org_admin 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 管理視圖啟動升級流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openUpgradeFlow，導向 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can start upgrade flow, current subscription and organization context are passed to feature, and backend authorization blocks non-Org Admin users from invoking upgrade

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 管理視圖啟動降級流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openDowngradeFlow，導向 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can start downgrade flow, current subscription and organization context are passed to feature, and backend authorization blocks non-Org Admin users from invoking downgrade

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 管理視圖啟動取消流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openCancelFlow，導向 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can start cancellation flow, current subscription context is passed to feature, and backend authorization blocks non-Org Admin users from canceling subscription

narrative.summary: 從 Subscription 管理視圖前往 Payment Methods。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 openPaymentMethods，導向 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: only Org Admin can navigate to payment methods from subscription management area, target page remains organization-scoped, and payment-method management stays inaccessible to non-Org Admin users

narrative.summary: 關閉 Subscription 管理差異視圖並返回 Base 頁。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionPage.OrgAdmin.Init 觸發 closeOrgAdminSubscriptionActions，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: closing Org Admin subscription delta returns to base subscription page without mutating current plan, pending change, or organization context

source.sectionTitle: ⑳ Auth Login Feature State Machine

validations.description: login feature opens from public auth entry, no protected app data is fetched before credentials submit, and auth feature remains reachable only through defined login path

narrative.summary: 送出登入認證。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Init 觸發 submitLogin，進入 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting。

validations.description: credential submit sends authentication request once, submit control prevents duplicate posts, and backend session handling starts without assuming role from client state

narrative.summary: 登入為組織使用者。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 收到 loginAsOrganizationUser，轉入 AuthLoginFeature.MemberAuthenticated。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with non-platform-admin session, session is created, organization memberships are available for app scope, and no Platform Admin-only route is granted

narrative.summary: 登入為平台管理員。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 收到 loginAsPlatformAdmin，轉入 AuthLoginFeature.PlatformAdminAuthenticated。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with platform admin identity, session marks is_platform_admin true, and admin routes become available without granting arbitrary organization Org Admin rights

narrative.summary: Login Page 包含登入功能流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_login 到 feature_auth_login 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 登入成功後進入 App Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.MemberAuthenticated 觸發 loginToApp，導向 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: post-login navigation to /app succeeds for authenticated organization user, authenticated app header is shown, and dashboard data is fetched only after session creation

narrative.summary: 平台管理員登入後進入 Admin Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.PlatformAdminAuthenticated 觸發 loginToAdmin，導向 AdminDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: post-login navigation to /admin succeeds only for platform admin, admin header appears, and protected admin overview loads after authorized session creation

narrative.summary: 取消登入並返回 Login Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Init 觸發 cancelLogin，導向 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel returns to login page without creating session, login form becomes active again, and no protected route is entered

source.sectionTitle: ㉑ Auth Sign Up Feature State Machine

validations.description: sign-up feature opens from public onboarding entry, no protected app data is fetched before registration submit, and guest-safe navigation remains active

narrative.summary: 送出註冊資料。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignUpFeature.Init 觸發 submitSignUp，進入 AuthSignUpFeature.Submitting。

validations.description: registration submit sends one onboarding request, submit control prevents duplicate posts, and backend starts user, organization, and initial subscription provisioning through the defined flow

narrative.summary: 完成註冊與初始資源建立。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignUpFeature.Submitting 收到 createUserOrganizationAndSubscription，轉入 AuthSignUpFeature.Provisioned。

validations.description: signup API returns 200 or created result with new user, initial organization, membership, and subscription record, and resulting entities are linked consistently for the same organization scope

narrative.summary: Sign Up Page 包含註冊功能流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_sign_up 到 feature_auth_sign_up 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 註冊完成後進入 App Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignUpFeature.Provisioned 觸發 signUpToApp，導向 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: after provisioning, authenticated app navigation succeeds, dashboard opens for the new organization, and subscription summary reflects the initial created subscription state

narrative.summary: 取消註冊並返回 Sign Up Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignUpFeature.Init 觸發 cancelSignUp，導向 SignUpPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel returns to sign-up page without creating user, organization, or subscription records, and public onboarding view becomes active again

source.sectionTitle: ㉒ Organization Switch Feature State Machine

validations.description: organization switch feature opens only for authenticated users with multiple memberships, current page data remains bound to active organization until switch completes, and no unrelated organization data is exposed

narrative.summary: 開啟組織切換器。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Init 觸發 openOrganizationSwitcher，進入 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Selecting。

validations.description: switcher lists only organizations the current user belongs to, selected organization options are derived from membership data, and no guessed organization_id can appear

narrative.summary: 套用新的組織範圍。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Selecting 觸發 chooseOrganization，進入 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied。

validations.description: selected organization is validated against current user memberships, active organization context updates once, and subsequent data fetches use the new organization_id consistently

narrative.summary: App Dashboard 掛載組織切換功能。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_app_dashboard 到 feature_organization_switch 的父子關係，作為跨頁共用的切換功能入口。

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Dashboard。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForDashboard，導向 AppDashboardPage.Init。

validations.description: dashboard reloads using the newly selected organization_id, subscription, usage summary, and invoice preview reflect that organization, and prior organization data is replaced

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Subscription。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForSubscription，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: subscription page reloads using the newly selected organization_id, plan and status belong to that organization, and cross-org data isolation is preserved

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Usage。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForUsage，導向 UsagePage.Init。

validations.description: usage page reloads using the newly selected organization_id and current billing period, meter values and limits belong to that organization, and no stale values from prior organization remain visible

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Invoices。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForInvoices，導向 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: invoice page reloads using the newly selected organization_id, invoice rows belong only to that organization, and totals from prior organization are cleared

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Payment Methods。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForPaymentMethods，導向 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: payment methods page reloads using the newly selected organization_id, access still requires Org Admin in that organization, and no payment method from the prior organization remains visible

narrative.summary: 切換組織後返回 Members。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrganizationSwitchFeature.Applied 觸發 switchForMembers，導向 MembersPage.Init。

validations.description: members page reloads using the newly selected organization_id, access still requires Org Admin in that organization, and no member record from the prior organization remains visible

source.sectionTitle: ㉓ Subscription Upgrade Feature State Machine

validations.description: upgrade feature opens only for Org Admin, current subscription and eligible target plans are scoped to the selected organization, and non-Org Admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 選擇較高等級方案。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.Init 觸發 selectHigherPlan，進入 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.Reviewing。

validations.description: selectable target plans are active plans with higher tier or price context defined by backend data, current and target billing cycle details are shown, and ineligible plans are not offered

narrative.summary: 確認升級並建立補差額發票。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.Reviewing 觸發 confirmUpgrade，進入 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.ProrationInvoiceOpen。

validations.description: confirming upgrade updates subscription plan immediately, creates one Open proration invoice, recalculates entitlement to unlock new features at once, and writes auditable subscription change timestamps

narrative.summary: 補差額付款成功並套用 Active 升級結果。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.ProrationInvoiceOpen 收到 paymentSucceeded，轉入 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.ActiveApplied。

validations.description: payment success marks proration invoice Paid, subscription stays Active, entitlement remains upgraded, and duplicate payment callbacks do not create extra charges or duplicate state transitions

narrative.summary: 補差額付款失敗並進入 PastDue。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.ProrationInvoiceOpen 收到 paymentFailed，轉入 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.PastDueApplied。

validations.description: payment failure marks proration invoice Failed or unpaid Open outcome per billing flow, subscription moves to PastDue with grace_period_end_at set, and upgraded entitlement follows payment-failure rules consistently

narrative.summary: Subscription Org Admin Delta 包含升級功能流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_subscription_org_admin 到 feature_subscription_upgrade 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 升級成功後返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.ActiveApplied 觸發 returnActiveSubscription，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to subscription page shows upgraded plan, Active status, current billing cycle, and proration invoice result consistently for the selected organization

narrative.summary: 付款失敗後前往 Invoices 檢視補差額發票。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.PastDueApplied 觸發 reviewFailedProrationInvoice，導向 InvoicesPage.Init。

validations.description: invoice history shows the failed or open proration invoice for the selected organization, payment result is visible, and subscription PastDue state matches billing outcome

narrative.summary: 取消升級並返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionUpgradeFeature.Reviewing 觸發 cancelUpgrade，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits upgrade flow without changing current plan, entitlement, or invoice data, and subscription page still shows pre-upgrade state

source.sectionTitle: ㉔ Subscription Downgrade Feature State Machine

validations.description: downgrade feature opens only for Org Admin, current subscription and eligible lower plans are scoped to the selected organization, and non-Org Admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 選擇較低等級方案。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.Init 觸發 selectLowerPlan，進入 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.Reviewing。

validations.description: selectable target plans are valid downgrade options from backend data, current and target billing cycle details are shown, and inactive plans cannot be chosen as downgrade target

narrative.summary: 確認降級並排入下期生效。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.Reviewing 觸發 confirmDowngrade，進入 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.PendingChangeScheduled。

validations.description: confirming downgrade stores pending_plan_id and pending_effective_at for next billing cycle, current subscription remains unchanged until effective date, and soon-to-expire features or limits are flagged in UI

narrative.summary: Subscription Org Admin Delta 包含降級功能流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_subscription_org_admin 到 feature_subscription_downgrade 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 排定降級後返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.PendingChangeScheduled 觸發 returnPendingDowngrade，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to subscription page shows current plan unchanged plus pending downgrade details and effective date, and downgrade has not yet changed active entitlement except future warning indicators

narrative.summary: 排定降級後前往 Usage 檢視超量風險。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.PendingChangeScheduled 觸發 reviewOverLimitRisk，導向 UsagePage.Init。

validations.description: usage page highlights current usage against upcoming lower limits, over-limit risk is shown according to Block, Throttle, or Overage policy, and values remain scoped to the selected organization

narrative.summary: 取消降級並返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionDowngradeFeature.Reviewing 觸發 cancelDowngrade，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits downgrade flow without setting pending_plan_id or pending_effective_at, current plan remains unchanged, and no upcoming feature-loss warning is persisted

source.sectionTitle: ㉕ Subscription Cancel Feature State Machine

validations.description: cancellation feature opens only for Org Admin, current subscription context is scoped to the selected organization, and non-Org Admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟取消確認畫面。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Init 觸發 openCancelConfirmation，進入 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Reviewing。

validations.description: cancel confirmation shows current subscription status and consequence summary, irreversible rules are made clear, and confirmation action is shown once

narrative.summary: 確認取消訂閱。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Reviewing 觸發 confirmCancellation，進入 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Canceled。

validations.description: confirming cancellation sets subscription status to Canceled with canceled_at timestamp, audit trail is written for the organization action, and subscription does not auto-return to Active afterward

narrative.summary: Subscription Org Admin Delta 包含取消訂閱功能流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_subscription_org_admin 到 feature_subscription_cancel 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 取消訂閱後返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Canceled 觸發 returnCanceledSubscription，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: subscription page shows Canceled status and cancellation timestamp for the selected organization, current plan remains readable, and reactivation is not offered as automatic status reversal

narrative.summary: 中止取消訂閱並返回 Subscription Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionCancelFeature.Reviewing 觸發 abortCancellation，導向 SubscriptionPage.Init。

validations.description: abort exits cancellation flow without changing subscription status or timestamps, and subscription page still shows the prior non-canceled state

source.sectionTitle: ㉖ Payment Method Manage Feature State Machine

validations.description: payment method management feature opens only for Org Admin, selected organization context is preserved, and non-Org Admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟付款方式表單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Init 觸發 openPaymentMethodForm，進入 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Editing。

validations.description: payment method form renders for add or update mode, editable fields are shown once, and current default method context is loaded only for the selected organization

narrative.summary: 送出付款方式變更。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Editing 觸發 submitPaymentMethod，進入 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Saving。

validations.description: submit sends one payment method create or update request, save action prevents duplicate submission, and backend enforces organization_id isolation for the payment method record

narrative.summary: 付款方式儲存成功。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Saving 收到 paymentMethodSaved，轉入 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Saved。

validations.description: payment method API returns success and persists provider reference plus default flag for the selected organization, list consistency is maintained, and no duplicate method is created by repeated callbacks

narrative.summary: Payment Methods Page 包含付款方式管理流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_payment_methods 到 feature_payment_method_manage 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 付款方式儲存完成後返回 Payment Methods Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Saved 觸發 returnPaymentMethods，導向 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: returning page shows updated payment method list for the selected organization, default state is reflected correctly, and Org Admin management CTA remains available once

narrative.summary: 取消付款方式編輯並返回 Payment Methods Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentMethodManageFeature.Editing 觸發 cancelPaymentMethodEdit，導向 PaymentMethodsPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits form without persisting payment method changes, payment methods page still shows prior saved data only, and organization scope remains unchanged

source.sectionTitle: ㉗ Member Management Feature State Machine

validations.description: member management feature opens only for Org Admin, selected organization context is preserved, and non-Org Admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟成員管理動作。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MemberManagementFeature.Init 觸發 openMemberAction，進入 MemberManagementFeature.Editing。

validations.description: invite, remove, or role-change form renders with organization-scoped member context, editable action appears once, and no external organization member is loaded

narrative.summary: 送出成員變更。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MemberManagementFeature.Editing 觸發 submitMemberChange，進入 MemberManagementFeature.Applying。

validations.description: submit sends one organization-scoped member management request, action prevents duplicate submission, and backend enforces RBAC plus organization_id isolation to prevent IDOR

narrative.summary: 成員變更已套用。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MemberManagementFeature.Applying 收到 membershipUpdated，轉入 MemberManagementFeature.Updated。

validations.description: API returns success with updated member list or role state for the selected organization, membership status and role remain consistent, and auditability requirements for management action are preserved

narrative.summary: Members Page 包含成員管理流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_members 到 feature_member_management 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 成員更新後返回 Members Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MemberManagementFeature.Updated 觸發 returnMembers，導向 MembersPage.Init。

validations.description: returning members page shows updated member list, role, and status for the selected organization, and removed or changed members no longer appear with stale values

narrative.summary: 取消成員變更並返回 Members Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MemberManagementFeature.Editing 觸發 cancelMemberChange，導向 MembersPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits member management without persisting invite, removal, or role-change action, and members page still shows prior saved state only

source.sectionTitle: ㉘ Plan Management Feature State Machine

validations.description: plan management feature opens only for Platform Admin, selected plan context is loaded from backend-driven plan data, and non-admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟方案編輯表單。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PlanManagementFeature.Init 觸發 openPlanForm，進入 PlanManagementFeature.Editing。

validations.description: plan form renders editable price, billing cycle, limits, features, and active flag fields, form action appears once, and UI does not hard-code plan definitions

narrative.summary: 送出方案定義。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PlanManagementFeature.Editing 觸發 submitPlanDefinition，進入 PlanManagementFeature.Saving。

validations.description: submit sends one plan create or update request, save action prevents duplicate submission, and backend validates data-driven limits and features instead of client-only assumptions

narrative.summary: 方案已儲存。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PlanManagementFeature.Saving 收到 planSaved，轉入 PlanManagementFeature.Updated。

validations.description: plan API returns success with persisted plan name, billing cycle, price, limits, features, and active state, audit log records who changed the plan and when, and updated plan becomes available or unavailable per is_active rule

narrative.summary: Admin Plans Page 包含方案管理流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_admin_plans 到 feature_plan_management 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 方案儲存後返回 Admin Plans Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PlanManagementFeature.Updated 觸發 returnPlans，導向 AdminPlansPage.Init。

validations.description: returning plan list shows new or updated plan values from backend data, disabled plans remain non-selectable for new subscription changes, and no duplicate plan row is created

narrative.summary: 取消方案編輯並返回 Admin Plans Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PlanManagementFeature.Editing 觸發 cancelPlanEdit，導向 AdminPlansPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits plan form without persisting changes, plan list remains at prior saved state, and platform scope remains unchanged

source.sectionTitle: ㉙ Subscription Review Feature State Machine

validations.description: subscription review feature opens only for Platform Admin, platform-wide search context is preserved, and non-admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟訂閱查詢與篩選。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Init 觸發 openSearchAndFilters，進入 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Filtering。

validations.description: search and filter controls render for platform subscription review, filter action appears once, and no organization-specific data is shown before query is applied

narrative.summary: 套用訂閱查詢條件。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Filtering 觸發 applySubscriptionFilters，進入 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Results。

validations.description: filter request returns 200 with matching subscriptions, statuses, billing cycles, and organization identifiers permitted for platform review, and results remain consistent with current filters

narrative.summary: Admin Subscriptions Page 包含訂閱審查流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_admin_subscriptions 到 feature_subscription_review 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 完成審查後返回 Admin Subscriptions Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Results 觸發 returnSubscriptionList，導向 AdminSubscriptionsPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to subscription overview preserves last review context appropriately, platform authorization remains enforced, and results stay protected from non-admin access

narrative.summary: 從審查結果前往風險佇列。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Results 觸發 inspectRiskFromResult，導向 AdminRiskAccountsPage.Init。

validations.description: navigating to risk queue carries platform admin scope, selected risky subscription can be found there consistently, and protected risk access remains enforced

narrative.summary: 取消訂閱審查並返回 Admin Subscriptions Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SubscriptionReviewFeature.Filtering 觸發 cancelSubscriptionReview，導向 AdminSubscriptionsPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits review feature without mutating subscription data, overview list returns to prior saved results or default query state, and platform scope remains unchanged

source.sectionTitle: ㉚ Risk Override Feature State Machine

validations.description: override feature opens only for Platform Admin, selected organization risk context is preserved, and non-admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟風險覆寫對話框。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.Init 觸發 openOverrideDialog，進入 RiskOverrideFeature.Reviewing。

validations.description: override dialog shows current subscription status, existing forced_status if any, and reason input, and force-status actions appear once for the selected organization

narrative.summary: 確認強制 Suspended。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.Reviewing 觸發 confirmForceSuspended，進入 RiskOverrideFeature.ForcedSuspended。

validations.description: override API records forced_status as Suspended with reason and actor identity, entitlement recalculates using admin override priority, and audit log stores who, when, what, and why

narrative.summary: 確認強制 Expired。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.Reviewing 觸發 confirmForceExpired，進入 RiskOverrideFeature.ForcedExpired。

validations.description: override API records forced_status as Expired with reason and actor identity, entitlement recalculates using expired override priority, Expired becomes irreversible, and audit log stores who, when, what, and why

narrative.summary: Admin Risk Accounts Page 包含風險覆寫流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_admin_risk_accounts 到 feature_risk_override 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 強制 Suspended 後返回風險佇列。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.ForcedSuspended 觸發 returnRiskQueue，導向 AdminRiskAccountsPage.Init。

validations.description: risk queue reload shows selected organization in suspended override state, entitlement reflects forced suspension, and override remains traceable in audit history

narrative.summary: 強制 Expired 後返回風險佇列。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.ForcedExpired 觸發 returnExpiredQueue，導向 AdminRiskAccountsPage.Init。

validations.description: risk queue reload shows selected organization in expired override state, entitlement remains blocked with no restoration path to usable status, and override remains traceable in audit history

narrative.summary: 取消覆寫並返回風險佇列。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 RiskOverrideFeature.Reviewing 觸發 cancelOverride，導向 AdminRiskAccountsPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits override dialog without changing forced_status or entitlement, and risk queue still shows the prior persisted override state only

source.sectionTitle: ㉛ Audit Log Query Feature State Machine

validations.description: audit query feature opens only for Platform Admin, existing audit filter context is preserved, and non-admin users cannot enter this feature

narrative.summary: 開啟稽核篩選條件。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuditLogQueryFeature.Init 觸發 openAuditFilters，進入 AuditLogQueryFeature.Filtering。

validations.description: filter controls for actor, role, organization, action, and time range render, query action appears once, and no additional audit rows are loaded until filter is applied

narrative.summary: 套用稽核篩選並取得結果。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuditLogQueryFeature.Filtering 觸發 applyAuditFilters，進入 AuditLogQueryFeature.Results。

validations.description: audit query API returns 200 with matching who, when, what, why records for the selected filters, results remain platform-authorized, and entries reflect stored actor and target metadata consistently

narrative.summary: Admin Audit Log Page 包含稽核查詢流程。
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_admin_audit_log 到 feature_audit_log_query 的父子關係。

narrative.summary: 完成稽核查詢後返回 Audit Log Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuditLogQueryFeature.Results 觸發 returnAuditLog，導向 AdminAuditLogPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to audit page shows filtered or refreshed audit entries consistently, audit access remains restricted to Platform Admin, and no unauthorized user can view results by direct route access

narrative.summary: 取消稽核查詢並返回 Audit Log Page。
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuditLogQueryFeature.Filtering 觸發 cancelAuditQuery，導向 AdminAuditLogPage.Init。

validations.description: cancel exits audit query flow without mutating audit data, audit page returns to prior saved query state or default state, and platform scope remains unchanged
